heading: Annual report on force structure changes exhibit for the defense budget
label: 233a Annual report on force structure changes exhibit for the defense budget

children.heading: .—Annual Report
children.label: a .—Annual Report
children.text: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for a fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to , the Secretary of Defense shall submit to the congressional defense committees a report on any major weapon systems proposed to be divested, re-prioritized, or retired in such budget.section 1105 of title 31
Identification of each major weapon system the Secretary of Defense proposes to divest, re-prioritize, or retire in the period of five fiscal years following the date of the report.
Budget line-item details related to each major weapon system identified under paragraph (1).

children.label: A
children.text: the timeline for the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement, including any factors that may affect such timelines positively or negatively;

children.label: B
children.text: any cost savings associated with the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement;

children.label: C
children.text: the rationale for the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement, including a qualitative description of the risk associated with the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement based on the most recent National Defense Strategy (as of the date of the report);

children.label: D
children.text: any critical dependencies with other program efforts that might affect the timeline for such divestment, reprioritization, or retirement;

children.label: E
children.text: the expected disposition of the weapon system after divestment, re-prioritization or retirement; and

children.label: F
children.text: identification of the system or systems that are expected to satisfy the military requirements that were fulfilled by the weapon system once the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement of that weapon system is completed.

children.heading: .—Relationship to Other Reports
children.label: c .—Relationship to Other Reports
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall ensure that the report required under subsection (a) is deconflicted with the report required under .section 222e of this title

children.heading: .—Major Weapon System Defined
children.label: d .—Major Weapon System Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “major weapon system” has the meaning given that term in .section 101(a) of this title
